tasks.title: Setup TypeScript Project with MCP SDK Foundation
tasks.description: Initialize the TypeScript project structure with MCP SDK integration, proper configuration, and development tooling
tasks.details: Create package.json with dependencies: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk (latest), zod, node-fetch. Setup tsconfig.json with strict mode, ES2022 target, and Node.js 18+ compatibility. Create src/ directory structure with index.ts as entry point. Configure build scripts and development environment. Follow project conventions: no semicolons, kebab-case files, TypeScript strict mode.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify project builds successfully, MCP SDK imports work, and TypeScript compilation passes with strict mode enabled

tasks.title: Implement Authentication Management System
tasks.description: Create secure authentication handling for JIGX_API_KEY with environment variable support and request header attachment
tasks.details: Create auth.ts module that reads JIGX_API_KEY from environment variables or MCP configuration. Implement secure key storage and validation. Create helper functions to attach Bearer token to request headers. Add key sanitization for logs and error messages to prevent exposure. Include fallback mechanisms and clear error messages for missing authentication.
tasks.testStrategy: Test with valid/invalid API keys, verify headers are properly attached, confirm no key exposure in logs or error messages

tasks.title: Create OpenAPI Parser and Tool Generator
tasks.description: Build a system to parse OpenAPI 3.0.1 specifications and automatically generate MCP tool definitions with Zod schemas
tasks.details: Create openapi-parser.ts that reads JSON specs and extracts paths, operations, parameters, and schemas. Implement tool name conversion (operationId to snake_case). Generate Zod schemas from OpenAPI schema definitions, handling $ref resolution. Create tool definition generator that produces MCP Tool objects with proper inputSchema using zodToJsonSchema. Support query params, path params, and request bodies. Handle security schemes and authentication requirements.
tasks.testStrategy: Test with sample OpenAPI specs, verify generated tools have correct schemas, validate Zod schema generation and JSON Schema conversion

subtasks.title: Create OpenAPI Specification Parser
subtasks.description: Build the core parser to read and validate OpenAPI 3.0.1 JSON specifications, extracting basic structure including paths, operations, and metadata
subtasks.details: Create openapi-parser.ts with functions to load JSON specs, validate OpenAPI version, extract paths object, and parse operation objects (GET, POST, etc.). Include error handling for malformed specs and create TypeScript interfaces for OpenAPI structure. Implement basic validation to ensure required fields are present.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests with sample OpenAPI specs, including valid and invalid cases. Test parsing of different HTTP methods and path structures.

subtasks.title: Implement Parameter and Schema Extraction
subtasks.description: Extract and process parameters (query, path, header) and request/response schemas from OpenAPI operations, including $ref resolution
subtasks.details: Extend parser to extract parameters from operation objects, handling different parameter types (query, path, header, cookie). Implement $ref resolution for both local references (#/components/schemas/Model) and external references. Create utility functions to resolve nested references and handle circular dependencies. Extract request body schemas and response schemas.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with OpenAPI specs containing various parameter types, nested $refs, and complex schema structures. Verify circular reference handling.

subtasks.title: Build Zod Schema Generator
subtasks.description: Convert OpenAPI schema definitions to Zod schemas, handling all OpenAPI data types, formats, and validation rules
subtasks.details: Create schema converter that maps OpenAPI types (string, number, integer, boolean, array, object) to Zod equivalents. Handle OpenAPI formats (date, date-time, email, uri, etc.) with appropriate Zod validations. Support validation rules like minimum, maximum, pattern, enum, required fields. Handle oneOf, anyOf, allOf schema compositions. Create recursive schema building for nested objects and arrays.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test conversion of all OpenAPI data types and formats. Verify validation rules are properly applied. Test complex schema compositions and nested structures.

subtasks.title: Implement Tool Name Conversion and Definition Structure
subtasks.description: Convert OpenAPI operationIds to snake_case tool names and create the basic MCP tool definition structure
subtasks.details: Create utility function to convert operationId from camelCase/PascalCase to snake_case for tool names. Handle cases where operationId is missing by generating names from HTTP method and path. Build MCP Tool object structure with name, description (from operation summary/description), and placeholder for inputSchema. Extract and format tool descriptions from OpenAPI operation metadata.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test name conversion with various operationId formats. Verify tool structure matches MCP Tool interface. Test fallback naming when operationId is absent.

subtasks.title: Generate Complete MCP Tool Definitions with JSON Schema
subtasks.description: Combine all components to generate complete MCP tool definitions with proper inputSchema using zodToJsonSchema conversion
subtasks.details: Integrate Zod schema generator with tool definition builder. Use zodToJsonSchema to convert Zod schemas to JSON Schema format for MCP inputSchema. Combine path parameters, query parameters, and request body into single input schema. Handle authentication requirements by adding auth-related parameters to input schema. Create main generator function that takes OpenAPI spec and returns array of MCP Tool definitions. Add support for operation tags and security schemes.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end tests with complete OpenAPI specifications. Verify generated tools have valid JSON schemas. Test with authenticated endpoints and various parameter combinations.

tasks.title: Implement Core MCP Server with Request Handling
tasks.description: Create the main MCP server using McpServer class with proper tool registration and request/response handling
tasks.details: Create server.ts with McpServer initialization, name/version configuration. Implement tool registration system using server.registerTool(). Create request handler that validates inputs with Zod, makes authenticated API calls, and returns CallToolResult format. Add StdioServerTransport for CLI integration. Implement consistent error handling pattern with ZodError detection. Follow the tool implementation pattern specified in PRD with separate tool definitions and handlers.
tasks.testStrategy: Test server initialization, tool registration, request/response flow, and error handling with mock tools

subtasks.title: Create MCP Server Foundation with Configuration
subtasks.description: Set up the basic MCP server structure with McpServer class initialization, server configuration, and transport setup
subtasks.details: Create server.ts file and initialize McpServer with name and version configuration. Set up StdioServerTransport for CLI integration. Configure server metadata including capabilities and supported features. Establish the basic server lifecycle management.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for server initialization and configuration validation

subtasks.title: Implement Tool Registration System
subtasks.description: Create the tool registration infrastructure that allows dynamic registration of tools with their schemas and handlers
subtasks.details: Implement server.registerTool() functionality to register tools with their input/output schemas. Create a tool registry that maintains tool definitions, schemas, and handler mappings. Ensure tools are properly exposed through the MCP protocol.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for tool registration and schema validation

subtasks.title: Create Request Handler with Input Validation
subtasks.description: Implement the main request handling logic with Zod-based input validation and proper request routing
subtasks.details: Create request handler that receives tool calls, validates inputs using Zod schemas, and routes requests to appropriate tool handlers. Implement input sanitization and validation error handling. Ensure proper request/response flow according to MCP protocol.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for request validation and routing with various input scenarios

subtasks.title: Implement API Call Handler with Authentication
subtasks.description: Create the authenticated API call system that handles external API requests with proper authentication and response processing
subtasks.details: Implement authenticated API call functionality that handles HTTP requests with proper authentication headers. Create response processing logic that transforms API responses into CallToolResult format. Handle API rate limiting, timeouts, and connection errors.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock API tests for authentication flow and response handling

subtasks.title: Implement Comprehensive Error Handling System
subtasks.description: Create a consistent error handling pattern throughout the server with specific handling for ZodError and other common error types
subtasks.details: Implement centralized error handling that detects and properly formats ZodError validation failures, API errors, and system errors. Create error response formatting that follows CallToolResult structure. Add logging and error reporting mechanisms. Ensure graceful error recovery and proper error propagation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Error scenario testing with various error types and edge cases

tasks.title: Generate Tools from Jigx REST API v1
tasks.description: Parse jigx-rest-api-v1 OpenAPI specification and generate MCP tools for core platform operations
tasks.details: Use OpenAPI parser to process jigx-rest-api-v1-us-east-1-prod-default-oas30-postman.json. Generate tools for key endpoints: /organizations, /organizations/{id}/solutions, /organizations/{id}/members, /organizations/{id}/solutions/{id}/databases, /organizations/{id}/notifications. Create proper Zod schemas for each endpoint's parameters and request bodies. Set base URL to https://api.jigx.com/v1. Implement proper authentication header attachment. Add descriptive tool names and annotations (destructiveHint, idempotentHint).
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all v1 API endpoints are converted to tools, test tool definitions have correct schemas, validate authentication integration

subtasks.title: Parse OpenAPI Specification and Extract Endpoint Definitions
subtasks.description: Load and parse the jigx-rest-api-v1-us-east-1-prod-default-oas30-postman.json file to extract endpoint definitions for the target operations
subtasks.details: Use an OpenAPI parser library to read the JSON specification file. Extract endpoint definitions for /organizations, /organizations/{id}/solutions, /organizations/{id}/members, /organizations/{id}/solutions/{id}/databases, and /organizations/{id}/notifications. Parse HTTP methods, parameters, request/response schemas, and authentication requirements for each endpoint.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that all target endpoints are correctly parsed and their schemas are accessible

subtasks.title: Generate Zod Schemas for Request Parameters and Bodies
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive Zod validation schemas for all endpoint parameters, query parameters, and request bodies based on the OpenAPI specification
subtasks.details: Transform OpenAPI schema definitions into Zod schemas for each endpoint. Handle path parameters (like organization ID, solution ID), query parameters, and request body schemas. Ensure proper type validation, required field enforcement, and optional field handling. Create reusable schema components for common data structures.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test schema validation with valid and invalid input data to ensure proper validation behavior

subtasks.title: Implement Base HTTP Client with Authentication
subtasks.description: Create a base HTTP client configured for the Jigx API with proper authentication header handling and base URL configuration
subtasks.details: Set up HTTP client with base URL https://api.jigx.com/v1. Implement authentication header attachment mechanism for API requests. Handle common HTTP configurations like timeout, error handling, and response parsing. Create utility functions for making authenticated requests to the Jigx API.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test authentication header attachment and verify successful API connectivity with a simple endpoint call

subtasks.title: Generate MCP Tool Definitions for Each Endpoint
subtasks.description: Create MCP tool definitions for each target endpoint with proper tool names, descriptions, and parameter schemas
subtasks.details: Generate MCP tool definitions for each of the 5 target endpoints. Create descriptive tool names like 'jigx-list-organizations', 'jigx-get-organization-solutions', etc. Add comprehensive descriptions explaining each tool's purpose. Attach the Zod schemas as input schemas. Include appropriate hints (destructiveHint for DELETE/PUT operations, idempotentHint for GET operations).
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate that each tool definition has correct schema validation and proper metadata

subtasks.title: Implement Tool Execution Logic and Response Handling
subtasks.description: Implement the actual execution logic for each MCP tool, including API calls, response processing, and error handling
subtasks.details: Implement the handler functions for each MCP tool that make the actual HTTP requests to the Jigx API. Handle parameter validation, URL construction with path parameters, request body formatting, and response processing. Implement proper error handling for API errors, network issues, and validation failures. Format responses appropriately for MCP consumption.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test each tool with various input scenarios including valid requests, invalid parameters, and error conditions to ensure robust error handling

tasks.title: Generate Tools from Data API v20
tasks.description: Parse data-api-20 OpenAPI specification and generate MCP tools for database and data management operations
tasks.details: Process rest-data-api-20-us-east-1-prod-default-oas30-postman.json using the OpenAPI parser. Generate tools for database operations and data queries. Set base URL to https://api.jigx.com/data/v20. Create Zod schemas for data manipulation endpoints. Ensure proper authentication using same Bearer token pattern. Handle data-specific operations like queries, inserts, updates, and deletes with appropriate validation.
tasks.testStrategy: Test data API tool generation, verify database operation tools are created correctly, validate data query parameter handling

tasks.title: Generate Tools from Tool API v20
tasks.description: Parse tool-api-20 OpenAPI specification and generate MCP tools for development tools and utilities
tasks.details: Process rest-tool-api-20-us-east-1-prod-default-oas30-postman.json to create development and deployment tools. Set base URL to https://api.jigx.com/tool/v20. Generate tools for development workflows, deployment operations, and utility functions. Create appropriate Zod schemas for tool-specific parameters. Implement proper authentication and error handling for development operations.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify tool API endpoints are properly converted, test development tool functionality, validate deployment operation tools

tasks.title: Implement Comprehensive Error Handling and Retry Logic
tasks.description: Add robust error handling with meaningful messages, retry logic for transient failures, and proper error categorization
tasks.details: Create error-handler.ts with categorized error types: API errors, network failures, validation errors, authentication errors. Implement retry logic with exponential backoff for transient failures (5xx errors, network timeouts). Add contextual error messages with suggested fixes. Implement rate limiting detection and handling. Create error sanitization to prevent API key exposure. Add proper logging without sensitive data exposure.
tasks.testStrategy: Test various error scenarios, verify retry logic works correctly, confirm no sensitive data in error messages, validate error categorization

tasks.title: Create High-Level Workflow Tools
tasks.description: Implement semantic operations that combine multiple API calls for common Jigx workflows like app creation and deployment
tasks.details: Create workflow-tools.ts with high-level operations: 'create_jigx_app' (combines organization, solution, and initial setup calls), 'deploy_app' (handles deployment pipeline), 'import_data' (manages data import workflows), 'sync_database' (synchronizes data across environments). Each workflow tool should orchestrate multiple lower-level API calls, handle intermediate errors, and provide progress feedback. Use existing generated tools as building blocks.
tasks.testStrategy: Test complete workflows end-to-end, verify error handling in multi-step operations, validate progress reporting and rollback capabilities

tasks.title: Implement Request Validation and Response Caching
tasks.description: Add comprehensive input validation using Zod schemas and implement intelligent response caching for performance optimization
tasks.details: Enhance all tools with thorough Zod validation using .describe() for field documentation. Implement response caching with TTL for read operations, cache invalidation for write operations. Add request deduplication to prevent duplicate API calls. Create cache-control.ts with configurable cache policies per endpoint type. Implement cache warming for frequently accessed data. Add cache statistics and monitoring.
tasks.testStrategy: Test input validation with various invalid inputs, verify caching behavior for read/write operations, validate cache invalidation logic

tasks.title: Create Comprehensive Test Suite
tasks.description: Develop complete test coverage for all tools, error scenarios, and integration points with proper mocking
tasks.details: Create test/ directory with unit tests for each tool, integration tests for workflows, and end-to-end tests. Use Jest or similar testing framework. Mock Jigx API responses for consistent testing. Test error scenarios, authentication failures, network issues, and validation errors. Create test fixtures for OpenAPI specs and API responses. Add performance tests for caching and retry logic. Implement test coverage reporting with minimum 90% coverage target.
tasks.testStrategy: Achieve 90%+ test coverage, verify all error paths are tested, validate mock accuracy against real API behavior

tasks.title: Setup Production Configuration and Documentation
tasks.description: Create production-ready configuration, comprehensive documentation, and deployment preparation
tasks.details: Create production configuration with environment-specific settings, logging configuration, and monitoring setup. Write comprehensive README.md with installation, configuration, and usage instructions. Create API documentation for all generated tools. Add example prompts library showing common use cases. Implement health checks and basic telemetry. Create deployment scripts and CI/CD pipeline configuration. Add security hardening and performance optimization settings.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify production configuration works correctly, validate documentation accuracy, test deployment process in staging environment
